attributes.action: Protect Safety of British Public: End UK Complicity in US Illegal war on Iran
attributes.additional_details: The UK must condemn and end its support of the US & Israel's illegal war of aggression against Iran.The PM claims we “will not join offensive action now” but offering our bases to the US is tantamount to the same thing. Supporting their attacks against Iran is indefensible, risking our safety & making the world even more dangerous & unstable: "War is not a game. This shameful decision makes Britain complicit in the devastating consequences ahead-and jeopardises the safety of us all"
attributes.background: We, the British public, do not consent to supporting the US illegal war of aggression against Iran. Using British bases for unlawful military action puts us at direct risk of harm & involves us in inflicting harm against innocent civilians, such as the 153 school children already killed.

rejection.details: You may wish to sign this petition, which calls for similar action: "Withdraw involvement in war on Iran and seek diplomatic resolution" https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/761718
